MINI-MINUTES FOR MAR-12-2009 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT CITY NATIONAL BANK'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. THERE WERE NO CHECKS ON WHICH PLAINTIFF HAD A LIVE RIGHT TO SUE AS OF THE TIME OF THE EVENTS ALLEGEDLY GIVING RISE TO ESTOPPEL AND PLAINTIFF HAS NOT RAISED A TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT AS TO DEFENDANT'S NEGLIGENCE. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER PURSUANT TO CCP 437 C(G). JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: KIMBERLY JENNINGS, CSR# 11452
